---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Research & Publications — Rodrigo Hermont Ozon"
description: "PhD research in Industrial & Systems Engineering (PUCPR): time series, financial and Bayesian econometrics, multi-objective portfolio optimization, extremal events and forecasting. Publications, talks and academic service."
toc: false
---

::: {.rh-section}
<div class="rh-kicker">PhD research</div>
## Doctoral research at PUCPR

```{=html}
<div class="rh-card">
  <h3>PhD in Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</h3>
  <p><strong>Pontifical Catholic University of Paraná (PUCPR)</strong> — 2022 to 2027 (expected).
  Advisor: <strong>Gilberto Reynoso-Meza</strong>.</p>
  <p>Research on econometric forecasting and multi-objective decision-making for agricultural
  commodity portfolios: blending time series forecasting models, Bayesian and regime-switching
  volatility modelling, and Pareto-front portfolio selection under uncertainty.</p>
  <p>
    <span class="rh-pill">Time Series</span>
    <span class="rh-pill">Financial &amp; Bayesian Econometrics</span>
    <span class="rh-pill">Multi-objective Portfolio Optimization</span>
    <span class="rh-pill">Extremal Events</span>
    <span class="rh-pill">Forecasting</span>
  </p>
  <p style="margin-top:1rem;">
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-primary" href="https://pibicagrofinance.github.io/site/">PIBIC AgroFinance project site </a>
  </p>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
<div class="rh-kicker">Education</div>
## Academic background

```{=html}
<div class="rh-timeline">
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">2022 – 2027 (expected)</div>
    <h3>PhD Candidate, Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">PUCPR – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Applied time series analysis, financial and Bayesian econometrics, multi-objective
    portfolio optimization and modelling of extremal events. Advisor: Gilberto Reynoso-Meza.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">2011</div>
    <h3>MSc in Economic Development</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">UFPR – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Emphasis on big data, multivariate analysis and econometrics.
    <a href="https://acervodigital.ufpr.br/xmlui/bitstream/handle/1884/25651/Disserta_v12.pdf?sequence=1&amp;isAllowed=y">Read the thesis </a></p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">2007</div>
    <h3>BSc in Economics</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">UFPR – Curitiba, PR</div>
    <p>Undergraduate thesis on oil price volatility (GARCH-M), honored and continued as a research
    project at the UFPR Laboratory of Statistics and GeoInformation.
    <a href="http://leg.ufpr.br/doku.php/projetos:ehlers:volprev">View the project </a></p>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
<div class="rh-kicker">Publications & talks</div>
## Selected academic output

### Conference papers

```{=html}
<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H., Reynoso-Meza, G. (2024).</strong> <em>Comparative Analysis of Fuzzy Regression Models and Multicriteria Decision-Making for Commodity Market Forecasting Scenarios.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">Anais do LVI Simpósio Brasileiro de Pesquisa Operacional (SBPO), Fortaleza</span> <a href="https://proceedings.science/sbpo/sbpo-2024/papers/comparative-analysis-of-fuzzy-regression-models-and-multicriteria-decision-makin?lang=pt-br">proceedings</a></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H., Reynoso-Meza, G. (2024).</strong> <em>Predictive Maintenance Strategies in Agriculture Using Survival Analysis.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">XXV Congresso Brasileiro de Automática (CBA), Rio de Janeiro</span></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H., Reynoso-Meza, G. (2024).</strong> <em>Efficiency and Efficacy Comparison between NSGA-II and Differential Evolution in Multi-Objective Portfolio Optimization.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">ICPR Americas 2024 — Ohio University</span></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R., de Lima, J. D., Dranka, G. (2024).</strong> <em>Enhancing Grain Portfolio Risk Management with GAMLSS and MSGARCH.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">XXIV Encontro Brasileiro de Finanças (EBFIN)</span> <a href="https://doity.com.br/anais/24ebfin/area/36699">proceedings</a></div>
```

### Talks & posters

```{=html}
<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H. (2024).</strong> <em>PhD Finalist.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">XI ENPPEPRO — Encontro Nacional de Programas de Pós-Graduação em Engenharia de Produção</span></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H. (2024).</strong> <em>Integrating GAMLSS and Bayesian MSGARCH Models for Enhanced Forecasting of Commodity Price Returns: A Novel Approach in Financial Econometrics.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">1st SouthStat Meeting (UFPR) — poster</span></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H. (2023).</strong> <em>The Use of Time Series Disaggregation with the tempdisagg Package in Econometric Models.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">R Day (UFPR)</span></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H., Reynoso-Meza, G. (2023).</strong> <em>Portfolio Optimization with GARCH Models Using Multiple Time Windows for Pareto Frontiers.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">APREPRO / ConBRepro</span> <a href="https://aprepro.org.br/conbrepro/anais/2023/arquivos/10012023_161031_6519cd0fed1f2.pdf">paper</a></div>
```

### Working papers (2025–2026)

Doctoral research pipeline: sixteen manuscripts in preparation and submission. Titles subject to change; drafts available on request.

```{=html}
<p style="margin-top:1rem;"><strong>Portfolio optimization &amp; decision-making</strong></p>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>An Integration Framework for Multi-Objective Commodity Portfolio Decision-Making</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">thesis synthesis — flagship paper</span></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>A Many-Objective Evolutionary Benchmark for Multi-Period Commodity Portfolios</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Many-Objective Optimization of Technical Trading Strategies</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">with R. Vianna</span></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Regime-Conditional Dynamic Programming for Portfolio Refinement</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Distribution-Free Robust Control of Commodity Portfolios Under Regime Uncertainty</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Capacity Constraints and Multi-Asset Generalisation of Commodity Portfolio Strategies</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Pareto-Optimal Reinforcement Learning Portfolios for Commodity Trading</em></div>

<p style="margin-top:1.4rem;"><strong>Forecasting &amp; volatility modeling</strong></p>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>MSGARCH Against Competing Models for Commodity Price Returns</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Time-Varying Higher Moments in Agricultural Commodities via GAMLSS</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Chaos and Complexity in Economic and Financial Time Series</em></div>

<p style="margin-top:1.4rem;"><strong>Market structure, breaks &amp; early warnings</strong></p>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Causal Inference for Structural Breaks in Time Series</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Commodity Price Breaks: Detection versus Prediction</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Price Transmission in Four Brazilian Agricultural Commodities</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Regime-Aware Hybrid Anomaly Detection for Early Warnings in Food Security</em></div>

<p style="margin-top:1.4rem;"><strong>Foundations &amp; applications</strong></p>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>AI and Econometric Methods for Commodity Portfolio Optimization: A Systematic Literature Review</em></div>
<div class="rh-pub"><em>Real Options Valuation via Bayesian MCMC</em></div>
```

### Advising

```{=html}
<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H. (2024–2025).</strong> <em>Scientific Initiation Advisorship (PIBIC / PIBIC Jr., PUCPR) — concluded.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">Research project: "Innovations in Financial Modeling: AI and Econometrics Approaches for Agricultural Commodities Portfolio Optimization"</span> <a href="https://pibicagrofinance.github.io/site/">project site</a> · <a href="https://github.com/rhozon/Doutorado/blob/main/02_DeclaraC3A7C3A3o_Orientador_2024-2025_PAJR240085_rodrigo.hermont40pucpr.edu.br.pdf-assinado.pdf">advisor declaration</a></div>

<div class="rh-pub"><strong>Ozon, R. H. (2024).</strong> <em>Evaluation Declaration for SEMIC/SEMITI.</em> <span class="rh-pub-venue">XXXI Scientific Initiation Seminar at PUCPR</span> <a href="https://github.com/rhozon/Doutorado/blob/main/DeclaraC3A7C3A3o-Rodrigo20Hermont20Ozon-XXXI20SeminC3A1rio20de20IniciaC3A7C3A3o20CientC3ADfica20da20PUCPR.pdf">declaration</a></div>
```
:::

::: {.rh-section}
<div class="rh-kicker">Service</div>
## Peer review & committees

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:1.1rem; margin-top:1.4rem;">
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>Reviewer — Applied Soft Computing</h3>
    <p>Peer reviewer for the <em>Applied Soft Computing</em> journal (Elsevier), 2024 – present.
    <a href="https://github.com/rhozon/Doutorado/blob/main/Certificate_ASOC_Recognised.pdf">Reviewer certificate </a></p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>Reviewer — PRINCIPIA</h3>
    <p>Peer reviewer for the <em>PRINCIPIA</em> journal (UFJF, Juiz de Fora), 2024 – present.
    <a href="https://periodicos.ufjf.br/index.php/principia">Journal website </a></p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>Scientific Advisory Committee</h3>
    <p>Scientific Advisory Committee member at PUCPR (2023; 2024–2025), supporting the evaluation
    of research and scientific initiation programs.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<p style="margin-top:1.6rem;">
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hPcIR9oAAAAJ&amp;hl=en">Google Scholar</a>
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="http://lattes.cnpq.br/3532649625879285">Lattes CV</a>
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8003-4849">ORCID</a>
</p>
```
:::
